text: Stepping through halls of glass and modernity, I feel the quiet anticipation of knowledge waiting to be discovered. The clean lines and reflections draw me inward, inviting contemplation. Approaching the vibrant wall of R+D, I sense a merging of past and future, of inquiry and innovation. Here, among words and artifacts about humanity and technology, I feel inquisitive—almost electric. Possibility pulses through the air, asking me to question, to learn, and to imagine worlds beyond this very moment. I am both observer and participant, alive to the thrill of ideas in motion.
